description_long: This is a small, rustic cabin nestled within a dense forest of coniferous trees. The cabin features a dark, gabled roof and wooden exterior walls, blending harmoniously with its natural surroundings. A single entrance is visible at the front, accompanied by a small porch area, and the structure is surrounded on nearly all sides by closely packed trees, with a slight clearing at the front. The windows are minimal and small, contributing to the cozy, secluded feel of the cabin. The overall scene evokes a sense of isolation and tranquility, typical of a woodland retreat. The asset includes both the cabin and the surrounding forested terrain, making it a compact, immersive environment.
description: A small, rustic wooden cabin with a gabled roof, surrounded by dense coniferous forest and a small front porch area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cabin entrance, small porch, and a clearing in the dense forest.
description_view_1: Rear view with the cabin mostly obscured by thick trees, only the roof barely visible.
description_view_2: Back side of the cabin, with the gabled roof visible and trees densely packed around the structure.
description_view_3: Side view showing the cabin partially surrounded by trees, with the porch and entrance visible from an angle.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, constructed from dark wooden or shingle materials
attribute_window_arrangement: minimal, small rectangular windows sparsely distributed on the visible front and side facades, asymmetrical placement
attribute_door_placement: single exterior door centered on the front facade, opening onto a small porch
